opinion.h: GENERAL MOTORS CORP. v. STEWART , 433 U.S. 919 (1977)
GENERAL MOTORS CORPORATION, petitioner, v. Joe STEWART et al No. 76-1209
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit.
Denied.[ General Motors Corp. v. Stewart 433 U.S. 919 (1977) ]
